ddl.value: ("owner" IS NULL AND "pid" IS NULL AND "lease_expires_at" IS NULL) OR ("owner" IS NOT NULL AND length("owner") > 0 AND "pid" > 0 AND (("state" IN ('starting', 'running') AND "lease_expires_at" > 0) OR ("state" = 'failed' AND "lease_expires_at" IS NULL)))
ddl.name: adaptive_agent_owner_tuple_check

ddl.value: ("state" IN ('starting', 'running') AND "owner" IS NOT NULL) OR ("state" IN ('idle', 'stopped', 'lost') AND "owner" IS NULL) OR "state" = 'failed'
ddl.name: adaptive_agent_state_owner_check

ddl.value: length("hash") = 71 AND substr("hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_blob_hash_check

ddl.value: length("diff_hash") = 71 AND substr("diff_hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("diff_hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_checkpoint_diff_hash_check

ddl.value: length("content_hash") = 71 AND substr("content_hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("content_hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_detail_hash_check

ddl.value: length("model_policy_hash") = 71 AND substr("model_policy_hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("model_policy_hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_model_request_policy_hash_check

ddl.value: ("resolved_provider_id" IS NULL AND "resolved_model_id" IS NULL AND "resolved_variant" IS NULL AND "resolved_effective_context_limit" IS NULL) OR ("resolved_provider_id" IS NOT NULL AND length("resolved_provider_id") > 0 AND "resolved_model_id" IS NOT NULL AND length("resolved_model_id") > 0 AND "resolved_effective_context_limit" > 0)
ddl.name: adaptive_model_request_resolved_tuple_check

ddl.value: ("status" IN ('admitted', 'streaming') AND "time_completed" IS NULL) OR ("status" IN ('succeeded', 'failed', 'interrupted') AND "time_completed" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: adaptive_model_request_completion_check

ddl.value: length("content_hash") = 71 AND substr("content_hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("content_hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_roadmap_hash_check

ddl.value: length("model_policy_hash") = 71 AND substr("model_policy_hash", 1, 7) = 'sha256:' AND substr("model_policy_hash", 8) NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*'
ddl.name: adaptive_task_policy_hash_check
